name: golang-github-jbenet-go-context-dev
title: golang-github-jbenet-go-context-dev
description:
context.Context extensions
Package context contains some extensions to golang.org/x/net/context.
Subpackage ctxext provides multiple useful context constructors.
Subackage ctxio provides io.Reader and io.Writer wrappers that
respect context.Contexts. Use these at the interface between
context code and io.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jbenet-go-context-dev because context.Context extensions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jbenet-go-context-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jbenet-go-context-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jbenet-go-context-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
